GRP-LZ-OE-ALPHA-PROD-PROJ1-ADMIN-KEY.name: grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin
GRP-LZ-OE-ALPHA-PROD-PROJ1-ADMIN-KEY.description: Landing Zone Production environment, Project 1 administration access group.

PCY-LZ-OE-ALPHA-PROD-PROJ1-ADMIN-KEY.name: pcy-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin
PCY-LZ-OE-ALPHA-PROD-PROJ1-ADMIN-KEY.description: Grants grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin administration access in the Project 1 compartment in the Production environment.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to read all-resources in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to read bucket in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to inspect object in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to read audit-events in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to read work-requests in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to read instance-agent-plugins in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to use network-security-groups in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to use load-balancers in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to use vnics in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to use key-delegate in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to manage api-gateway-family in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to manage streams in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to manage cluster-family in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to manage alarms in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to manage metrics in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to manage logging-family in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to manage instance-family in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to manage volume-family in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1 where all{request.permission != 'VOLUME_BACKUP_DELETE', request.permission != 'VOLUME_DELETE', request.permission != 'BOOT_VOLUME_BACKUP_DELETE'}

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to manage object-family in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1 where all{request.permission != 'OBJECT_DELETE', request.permission != 'BUCKET_DELETE'}

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to manage file-family in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1 where all{request.permission != 'FILE_SYSTEM_DELETE', request.permission != 'MOUNT_TARGET_DELETE', request.permission != 'EXPORT_SET_DELETE', request.permission != 'FILE_SYSTEM_DELETE_SNAPSHOT', request.permission != 'FILE_SYSTEM_NFSv3_UNEXPORT'}

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to manage repos in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to manage orm-stacks in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to manage orm-jobs in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to manage orm-config-source-providers in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to manage bastion-session in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to manage cloudevents-rules in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to manage keys in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to manage secret-family in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to manage database-family in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to manage autonomous-database-family in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1

allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1-admin' to manage data-safe-family in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-oe-alpha:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-projects:cmp-lz-oe-alpha-prod-proj1
